MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer
Appearances:
Lloyd Crenna, Esq. for Plaintiff Robert Pritikin, also present, was sworn & examined.
No appearance by Defendant.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Robert Pritikin and against the defendant Pamela Birak AKA Pam Birak.
Damages of $13,510.00
Costs of $330.00
Punitive Damages $45,000.00 For the total of $58,840.00.
Judgment signed in open court.
